noise: A Consilio 2026 global survey reports legal teams are under pressure to implement AI. Technology decisions have surpassed work volume as their biggest challenge.
translation: You're feeling the market pressure to adopt AI, but the real headache is picking the right tools and integrating them safely. This isn't a tech problem; it's an operational one. With EU AI Act in 6 months, simply buying a tool won't cut it. Your existing workflows and data sovereignty are the real challenges.
action: I help managing partners identify compliant AI wins using your existing Microsoft 365, avoiding vendor hype. We can map your firm's immediate opportunities and build a secure, EU AI Act-ready plan in days.
